data.title: As a developer, regression tests reproduce the SC8-class failure shape and exercise SC2 contradiction + SC5 manual-pause paths end-to-end
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Add integration-level regression tests that exercise the three highest-risk cross-skill paths of this epic: (1) block-less externally-shaped epic fails preplanning per SC3; (2) contradiction in block (claude_auto + no/unknown access) fails brainstorm approval gate per SC2; (3) user_manual story reaches sprint pause handshake and handles done / skip via mock input seam per SC5. Integrate all three into validate.sh --ci so regressions in any of the four skills surface in CI.

**Why**: Advances SC7. Without these tests, only unit-level coverage exists in Stories B/C/D/E/F — the cross-skill boundaries (brainstorm → preplanning; preplanning → sprint) have no regression guard. A change to any of the four skills could silently break the end-to-end flow.

**Scope**:
- IN: Fixture epics in a scratch ticket store (separate from .tickets-tracker); end-to-end test runner that drives brainstorm → preplanning → sprint via skill harnesses; three test scenarios (block-less, contradiction, user_manual handshake); mock input seam for sprint handshake consumed by the user_manual scenario; integration into validate.sh --ci.
- OUT: Unit tests inside individual stories (those live in B/C/D/E/F); performance or load testing; real AWS/external service calls.

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, a regression test exists that creates a fixture epic with at least one externally-shaped SC but no External Dependencies block, runs the brainstorm → preplanning pipeline, and asserts preplanning refuses with the SC3 diagnostic
  Satisfies: "A regression test reproduces the SC8-class failure shape. An epic draft with at least one deployed/external-shaped success criterion but no External Dependencies block fails the brainstorm -> preplanning pipeline after this epic ships (specifically: preplanning refuses per SC3)."
- When this story is complete, a regression test exists that creates a fixture epic with a claude_auto + claude_has_access IN {no, unknown} dependency and asserts brainstorm's approval gate refuses per SC2
  Satisfies: "A regression test reproduces the SC8-class failure shape."
- When this story is complete, a regression test exists that creates a fixture epic with a user_manual dependency, runs brainstorm → preplanning → sprint via the mock input seam, and asserts the handshake handles done (with verification_command pass) and skip inputs correctly per SC5
  Satisfies: "A regression test reproduces the SC8-class failure shape."
- When this story is complete, all three regression tests run as part of validate.sh --ci and fail CI if any regression in the four skills breaks the path
  Satisfies: "regression test in place and green"
- When this story is complete, fixture ticket store is isolated from .tickets-tracker and cleaned up after each test run

## Considerations

- [Testing] Fixture ticket store setup should reuse patterns from existing integration tests (check plugins/dso/tests/); do not pollute .tickets-tracker
- [Testing] Mock input seam for sprint handshake must be the same seam used by Story F's unit tests — align so regression tests exercise the real code path
- [Reliability] CI failure diagnostics must name the failing scenario and the diagnostic mismatch clearly; a regression should be debuggable without reproducing locally

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
